name: Marketing — Cold Outreach Email v2 (Trigger-Anchored)
description: Replacement for the deleted v1. Anchors every cold email on a recent trigger event and runs a 5-touch 14-day cadence.
success_criteria: Send 25 trigger-anchored cold emails per day; reply rate >= 8% after 14-day cadence completes.

steps.name: Detect a trigger event for each prospect
checklist: Pull funding/hire/launch signals from Apollo + Crunchbase
Verify the trigger is from the last 30 days
Capture the URL of the source so the email can cite it
steps.success_criteria: Every prospect on today's list has a dated trigger event captured.

steps.name: Draft a 4-line personalized opener
checklist: Open with a one-sentence relevance proof tied to the trigger
State the value framing in plain English (no jargon)
Include exactly one soft CTA (no calendar links)
steps.success_criteria: Each draft passes the 90-word, single-CTA, trigger-mention checklist.

steps.name: Schedule the 5-touch cadence
checklist: Day 3: LinkedIn touch with no link
Day 5: short follow-up referencing the initial
steps.success_criteria: Cadence is scheduled and live in the sequencing tool for every prospect.

steps.name: Review replies daily and route to next action
checklist: Categorize each reply: positive, objection, not-now, unsubscribe
Route positives to the closer immediately
Update CRM with reply category + sentiment
steps.success_criteria: All replies categorized within 24 hours; closer notified same day for positives.
